title: Design Token (DTCG-compatible)
description: Schema for W3C Design Token Community Group format tokens used in @btech/tokens. Used by IDEs for autocomplete and by tools/validators/schema.ts in CI.

tokenValue.description: A leaf node carrying a concrete token value. Must have $value + $type.

$value.description: Raw value (string/number/boolean), composite object (shadow/typography/border), or array of composite objects (layered shadow per DTCG spec). May also be a reference like {path.to.other.token}.

$description.description: Human-readable description of what this token represents.

$deprecatedSince.description: Version in which this token was deprecated.

$replacement.description: Token path that replaces this deprecated token.

$removalTarget.description: Version in which this deprecated token will be removed.

tokenGroup.description: A group of tokens or nested token groups. May carry a group-level $description.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for IDE tooling.
